name: DermaAssess AI Backend
description: Unified FastAPI and Telegram Bot backend for DermaAssess AI Health Hub

SUPABASE_URL.description: URL of your Supabase project (e.g., https://xxxx.supabase.co)

JWT_SECRET.description: Secret for issuing custom JWTs to the frontend (min 32 chars)

CLOUDINARY_CLOUD_NAME.description: Cloudinary Cloud Name for image persistence

RESEND_API_KEY.description: Resend API Key for sending transactional emails

EMAIL_FROM.description: Email address to send from (e.g., noreply@yourdomain.com)

USDA_API_KEY.description: USDA FoodData Central API Key (optional but recommended for nutrition)

ALLOWED_ORIGINS.description: Comma-separated list of allowed CORS origins
